case_title: VICTOR KUBARA VS. LARISA JACON ESQUIVEL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LARISA JACON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBARA, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LARISA JACON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
